programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: Josh Gates investigates Dracula, Cold War psychic spying and Spartacus; from Vlad the Impaler's infamous reign of terror, to secret U.S. mind-control tests and a gladiator who defied Rome, he seeks the truth behind history's legends that refuse to die.

programme.title: Conspiracies and Cover-Ups
programme.desc: Andrew tests a disturbing theory: is a secret, directed-energy weapon used in Venezuela the smoking gun behind unexplained attacks on U.S. government officials overseas? These invisible attacks led to the horrifying symptoms now known as Havana Syndrome.

programme.title: Conspiracies and Cover-Ups
programme.desc: Are weather control fears fact, or just modern fiction? Andrew tests theories about chemtrails, cloud seeding, space lasers, and government weather weapons; through demonstrations and expert interviews, he untangles these conspiracies to find the truth.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Josh dives the frigid waters of the Baltic Sea in search of a revolutionary Nazi submarine, the V-80; Hitler orders it scuttled to prevent the Allies from learning its secrets; Josh risks it all to bring the prototype to the surface.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: Josh Gates investigates Dracula, Cold War psychic spying and Spartacus; from Vlad the Impaler's infamous reign of terror, to secret U.S. mind-control tests and a gladiator who defied Rome, he seeks the truth behind history's legends that refuse to die.

programme.title: Conspiracies and Cover-Ups
programme.desc: Andrew tests a disturbing theory: is a secret, directed-energy weapon used in Venezuela the smoking gun behind unexplained attacks on U.S. government officials overseas? These invisible attacks led to the horrifying symptoms now known as Havana Syndrome.

programme.title: Conspiracies and Cover-Ups
programme.desc: Are weather control fears fact, or just modern fiction? Andrew tests theories about chemtrails, cloud seeding, space lasers, and government weather weapons; through demonstrations and expert interviews, he untangles these conspiracies to find the truth.

programme.title: Hustlers Gamblers Crooks
programme.desc: A crafty card counter robs casinos using a pair of computerized shoes; a veteran card cheat must out-cheat another cheater; a brazen bookie attempts to outrun the law.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water
programme.desc: Just inches from bedrock and a potential life-changing payday at the Chute, Dustin Hurt and his crew are forced to dive in the most dangerous conditions they've ever faced.

programme.title: Airplane Repo
programme.desc: Repo men chase luxury planes for big dollars across America by relying upon their wits and skill for a high reward.

programme.title: Airplane Repo
programme.desc: Mike braves a potential suicide mission in California; Kevin is at the mercy of a mechanic and a windy night.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Wheels Up
programme.desc: The men face menacing mechanics, dangerous swamps and armed police officers in their attempts to repossess airplanes.

programme.desc: Mike braves gators in Florida to retrieve a Cessna Float plane; Ken and Danny have an encounter with an angry debtor.

programme.title: In the Eye of the Storm
programme.desc: During Christmas in 2023, severe storms unleashed an unseasonal tornado outbreak across Tennessee; as dozens of eyewitnesses capture the unbelievable, destructive power of nature, a twister strikes an electrical substation, triggering an explosion.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: In the Eye of the Storm
programme.desc: Cameras capture the unfolding disaster as a powerful EF-4 tornado devastates Mayfield, leveling the courthouse, police headquarters and jail where officers race to rescue trapped inmates while preventing escape.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: In the Eye of the Storm
programme.desc: In 2024, as a monster storm system unleashes a record-breaking derecho across Texas, eyewitnesses capture multiple destructive tornadoes on camera; when one twister targets a remote farmhouse, a weather spotter must race to save a young family.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: In the Eye of the Storm
programme.desc: In 2024, hundreds of cameras capture hurricanes slamming Florida's Gulf Coast; as category four Hurricane Helene brings record flooding, residents have no chance to recover before category three Hurricane Milton unleashes over 40 tornadoes.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: In the Eye of the Storm
programme.desc: Hurricane Helene barrels north into Appalachia, dumping 30 inches of rain; as hundreds of cameras capture flooding and mudslides, one woman gets swept away by the deluge, until a man attending a wedding rehearsal jumps into the water to save her.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: In the Eye of the Storm
programme.desc: After hitting Category five, Hurricane Ian slams Florida's Gulf Coast with 150 mph winds and a storm surge that sweeps away homes.

programme.title: Hoffman Family Gold
programme.desc: Todd gets Holy Roller running and catching nuggets; looking to make his mark, Hunter transports the largest wash plant the Hoffmans have ever used to the site; unloading the mammoth wash plant leads to a mammoth fight between father and son.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water
programme.desc: Dustin is close to bedrock gold at the Chute, but pressure gets to a crew member; Kayla battles the mammoth dive site at House Rock but attempts to keep the site safe backfire.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Last Woodsmen
programme.desc: Jared breaks free from his old partner and gets a do-or-die shot to buy a timber claim; with only ten days left to raise $200K in timber profits, his crew battles monster cedars as a raging fire threatens lives.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Last Woodsmen
programme.desc: Jared gambles his company on a ruthless deal to grab a legendary timber claim. But facing busted gear, brutal terrain, and cutthroat rivals, he's in a war for survival and the crown. Win, and he's king of the woods; lose, and his future is up in smoke.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Last Woodsmen
programme.desc: Facing the devastation of losing the "Forever Claim", Jared makes a desperate deal with the powerful businessman who outbid him, but new challenges could destroy his logging season before it begins.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Last Woodsmen
programme.desc: Fallers face timber challenges, but it will all be for nothing if Jared and crew can't get the 140-ton super snorkel up the mountain; a series of mechanical setbacks threatens to delay the first $100,000 barge royalty, due in less than two weeks.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Last Woodsmen
programme.desc: Stretched thin and off-pace, Jared watches a loader tumble down the road; foreman Brad attempts to land his plane in choppy weather, but is forced to shelter nearby; Barge Day arrives.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: A cracked tank on the Titan Explorer leaves Jake's engines vulnerable to seawater; Keith fires another deckhand but struggles to get rid of him for good; Johnathan prescribes alternative cures as the norovirus overtakes the Time Bandit crew at sea.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: Sig strikes gold raiding Keith's hot spot, but when a line snarls his wheel, he must call his rival for help; a rogue wave knocks out Rick's electronics, forcing Bob to take the helm; Harley breaks in a new co-captain, only to break down at sea.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: When the Time Bandit loses power with a storm at its tail, Johnathan deploys a camera probe to find what's snarling his propeller; Keith sets a decoy string to lure Sig away from good fishing, but risks his own secret plan by trusting the wrong ally.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: In the winter premiere, the snow crab fishery reopens unexpectedly after three years; Keith and Jake charge north, only to collide with an incoming Siberian storm; Sig and Rick form a wary alliance, but with big money on the line, trust fails fast.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: Winter season erupts as the fleet battles brutal seas and each other; Sig and Rick's alliance shatters as Keith fights through a debilitating injury and a short-handed crew; The Titan Explorer loses steering in heavy seas, leaving Jake dead.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: Six hundred miles from town, brutal cold threatens man and crab alike; Sig braves deadly icing while a tidal surge leaves Clark bloodied on deck; Keith and Jake team up to battle an aggressive trawler while Rick encounters a squall.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: Keith & Jake deploy guerrilla tactics when a factory trawler invades their grounds; at the Russian Line, Rick encounters temperatures so frigid that even snow crab can't survive on deck; Sig struggles against mounting breakdowns.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: Pushing into their breaking point, the fleet scrambles to collect the first Opilio windfall in three years; Clark takes the skipper role after Sig's collapse; Keith returns with a vengeance; rogue waves threaten Jake's operation.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: As buyers close their doors, the fleet scrambles to collect its first opilio windfall in three years.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: In the season premiere, the captains find a rare strain of red King crab in the north amid crushing ice and violent storms. Sig deploys an underwater drone to pinpoint the horde. Jake revives the legendary Cornelia Marie to battle perilous northern seas.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: The Bering Sea Triangle evokes fear in captains and crewmen alike; experts and crabbers explore the mystery surrounding a small triangle in Alaskan waters where boats vanish without a trace, never having made mayday calls.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: A U.S. Coast Guard swimmer, pilot and captain provide a look at the scariest Bering Sea rescues, along with Sig, Keith, Bill, Casey, Jake, and Sean.
